OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Sojour Properties is present. Represented by David Saenz
Attorney, David Brilliant, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, John Arnold, is present.
Attorney, Nathanael Player, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Comissioner Hewlett, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 612, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
